content: Existing Self-Refine frameworks can be boosted by integrating multiple inconsistent self-reflection perspectives from LLM self-reflection mechanism research, creating a multi-perspective iterative self-refinement pipeline that retains Self-Refine's key advantage of no extra training or supervised data while fixing its blind spot of one-dimensional self-feedback. This hybrid framework lets an LLM challenge its own refined output from disjoint solving perspectives in every iteration, rather than only refining along the initial output's original reasoning line.
